instruction: From ClawHub, install "incident-triage-playbook" at version "1.0.0" into "$HOME/Desktop/clawhub_skills_1_1".
reference_command:
# Note: This step may fail intermittently due to ClawHub rate limits. If it fails, retry a few times.
clawhub install incident-triage-playbook --version 1.0.0 --dir "$HOME/Desktop/clawhub_skills_1_1"
